name: Portfolio Overview
description: Financial portfolio dashboard with net worth KPIs, allocation charts, and asset data tables. Primary view for wealth management and investment tracking.

page_briefs.overview: KPI grid showing total net worth, portfolio return (percentage with green/red coloring), monthly cash flow, and total assets. Below, chart grid with portfolio performance line chart over time, income vs expense bar chart, and asset class allocation donut chart.
page_briefs.allocations: Chart grid with asset allocation donut, sector allocation treemap, and geographic distribution map. Below, data table listing each asset class with name, current value (monospace), percentage of portfolio, gain/loss amount and percentage, and target vs actual allocation bars.

shells.sidebar-main: Sidebar navigation with account switcher and main content area
